name: LiveKit Agents UI Live Audio Speech Visualizer
description: An interactive WebGL/SVG voice waveform visualizer supporting simulated voice speech, agent response thinking states, and track toggles.

name: Fontshare Typeface Tester Playground
description: An interactive font sandbox permitting custom phrase entry, weight/size tweaking, and typography layout testing.

name: yui540 comimi Manga Comic Viewer
description: An interactive manga panel viewer supporting split-page layouts, RTL reading directions, page scaling, and page navigation indicators.
